title: Onboarding - Login - Cancel
scenario: Cancel button on Poly Lens login dialog returns user to POLY LENS Login screen during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Accept the license agreement when prompted.
4. Observe the POLY LENS Login screen is displayed with 'Log in' and 'Continue as Guest' buttons.
6. Observe the login dialog appears with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' options.
expected: The user is returned to the POLY LENS Login screen with 'Log in' and 'Continue as Guest' buttons.
